title: coleus australis
intro: Coleus australis, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly used in traditional medicine and herbalism. The leaves of Coleus australis contain essential oils and flavonoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant. The health benefits of Coleus australis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, while also providing protection against various diseases. Herbal preparations of Coleus australis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
